2001_facup_arsenal_liverpool: Mark Warburton and Jamie Vardy contributed to BBC Radio 5 live coverage of Arsenal drew 1-1 at Anfield on Saturday. --- [Segment 13] Arsenal manager Arsene Wenger's side dredged 1-1 with Liverpool at Wembley on Saturday
2021_euro_england_ukraine: calvin phillips scored twice to give england a 1-0 win over ukraina in the first leg of their Euro 2016 Group D match at Wembley on Saturday
2019_uclfinal_liverpool_tottenham: Mauricio Pochettino has five years left as Tottenham manager and Jurgen Klopp is looking to win his first major trophy as the manager of Jurgen Klinsmann.
2022_wc_poland_argentina: Lionel Messi scored a hat-trick for Argentina as they thrashed Saudi Arabia 1-0 in their World Cup quarter-final qualifier at the Estadio Nacional.
1983_facup_final_brighton_manchesterunit: Mike Duxbury scored a brace for Man Utd against Brighton at Wembley. Alan Stableson and Steve Gathing scored twice for Manchester United as they beat Brighton 2-1 at Old Trafford on Saturday. Brighton drew 1-1 with Middlesbrough at Fratton Park.
2024_euro_england_slovakia: Gareth Southgate made just one change for Tuesday's Euro 2016 qualifier against Slovakia at Wembley Stadium.
2026_ucl_athleticclub_arsenal: It's Arsenal's first ever competitive game against Athletic Bilbao in European competition, and it's one of the great traditions of this great football club. --- [Segment 1] Alex Berengeir and Adama Boyro both scored in the first half against Arsenal at the Etihad Stadium on Saturday.
2022_wc_england_senegal: Senegal beat England 1-0 at Wembley on Saturday to move up to third place in the World Cup quarter-finals.
2021_euro_czechrepublic_england: Faggott Nilnil's England drew 0-0 at Wembley against the Czech Republic on Tuesday night in a World Cup qualifier.
